headline: 'Halftime' traders debate the market setup for the next half of 2026
summary: CNBC's "Halftime Report" team debate the end of the quarter and discuss their trading strategy heading into the second half of the year.

headline: What You Need To Know Ahead of CSX Corporation's Earnings Release
summary: CSX Corporation is expected to announce its second-quarter earnings next month, and Wall Street expects a high single-digit rise in its profits.
